arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta hints at 'surprise' January transfer deal amid Rashford links
arts.sum: There is still a long way to go, but Arsenal may well look to the mid-season transfer window as an opportunity to strengthen even further. And Arteta has openly admitted to not preparing for a busy January off the pitch either.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Dusan Vlahovic interest resurrected as Raheem Sterling decides on exit
arts.sum: Arsenal are stepping up their search for a new striker, with the Gunners now making a fresh pursuit for Dusan Vlahovic, who previously snubbed the Emirates to join Juventus

arts.ttl: Supercomputer predicts Premier League title winner after Arsenal, Man City & Liverpool stumble
arts.sum: How the Premier League title race was affected by draws for Arsenal and Liverpool as well as a defeat for Man City.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Jakub Kiwior 'makes decision over future'
arts.sum: Arsenal defender Jakub Kiwior allegedly decides whether he would entertain a transfer away from the Emirates Stadium in January.

arts.ttl: 'My Arsenal team-mate was getting hammered – I couldn’t believe it and had to support him'
arts.sum: This Arsenal star faced waves of criticism upon signing for the club in June 2023, forcing one of his Gunners team-mates to rally around him

arts.ttl: Arsenal icon Thierry Henry reveals next job demand as honest admission made after double sack
arts.sum: Thierry Henry has not ruled out heading back into club management after spending five years in the international game with Belgium and France. The former Arsenal academy coach and legendary forward has, largely, spent time with France, the nation's youth set-up, and Belgium.

arts.ttl: Will Arsenal gamble on Marcus Rashford transfer? Plus Gunners impressed by wonderkid, title race latest & more
arts.sum: Arsenal summer signing didn’t add anything against Everton, Mikel Arteta should’ve made *this* change… Saturday’s draw against Everton was incredibly frustrating, especially with it coming off the back of the Champions League win against Monaco. I really expected that success in midweek to lift Arsenal at the weekend, but it just didn’t happen. Everton arrived […] The post Will Arsenal gamble on Marcus Rashford transfer? Plus Gunners impressed by wonderkid, title race latest & more appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal predicted lineup vs Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's project requires silverware, and the Carabao Cup represents Arsenal's best chance of a trophy this season. Arsenal are still without a litany of full-backs but are otherwise healthy after Gabriel returned to the XI on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta: Arsenal manager's Martin Odegaard call shows shift from "chaos" to "control"
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has shifted from "chaos" to "control" as the Arsenal manager's conservative approach is increasingly criticised, Gunners expert Charles Watts tells Sports Mole

arts.ttl: Arsenal legend Thierry Henry insists 'a lot of things need to change' if his former team are going to beat Liverpool to the Premier League title
arts.sum: The Gunners have not been champions of England since 2003-04 when Henry and his fellow Invincibles went through the entire league campaign without losing.
